evidence.content:
\# Front

\> Deliver exceptional service at scale with Front, the modern CX platform combining client communication, automation, and analytics for customer-first teams

\## Core Features / Products
\- \[Front Overview\](https://front.com/product): Discover the main features and benefits of Front’s customer service platform.
\- \[Customer Service\](https://front.com/customer-service): AI-powered customer service platform built for collaboration.
\- \[Email Management\](https://front.com/email-management): Discover tools to manage customer emails efficiently.
\- \[Client Communication\](https://front.com/client-communication): Learn how to streamline communication with your clients.
\- \[AI Agent\](https://front.com/product/ai): Explore AI capabilities that enhance customer interactions.
\- \[Automation\](https://front.com/product/autopilot-customer-service-automation): Explore automation features to streamline workflows.
\- \[Copilot\](https://front.com/product/copilot-ai-assistant): Use AI assistant features to enhance customer support.
\- \[Smart QA\](https://front.com/product/smart-qa-automated-quality-assurance): Automate quality assurance for customer interactions.
\- \[Smart CSAT\](https://front.com/product/smart-csat-ai-scoring): Utilize AI to score and analyze customer satisfaction.
\- \[Omnichannel\](https://front.com/product/omnichannel-support-inbox): Support customers across multiple channels seamlessly.
\- \[Ticketing\](https://front.com/product/ticketing-system): Learn how to automate and manage customer support tickets.
\- \[Live chat\](https://front.com/product/live-chat): Implement live chat features to engage customers instantly.
\- \[Knowledge base\](https://front.com/product/knowledge-base): Create helpful articles and resources for customer self-service.
\- \[Integrations and API\](https://front.com/product/integrations-api): 100s of integrations to supercharge workflows bespoke to your business

\## Pricing and Plans
\- \[Pricing\](https://front.com/pricing): Compare pricing plans and features available for different tiers.

\## Resources and Insights
\- \[Product Tour\](https://front.com/product-tour): Take a guided tour of Front’s features and benefits.
\- \[Discover best practices\](https://front.com/resources): Access best practices for optimizing customer interactions.
\- \[Blog\](https://front.com/blog): Front's official blog is the best source for customer service, support, experience, and sales tips.
\- \[Customer Stories\](https://front.com/customer-stories): How Front customers drive measurable impact to their business.

\## Integrations / API
\- \[Integrations\](https://front.com/integrations): Explore third-party integrations to enhance Front's capabilities.
\- \[API Documentation\](https://dev.frontapp.com/docs/welcome): Learn how to integrate and use Front's APIs.

\## Support and Documentation
\- \[Help Center\](https://help.front.com/): Access FAQs and support articles for troubleshooting.
\- \[Community\](https://community.front.com/): Access key product discussions, read more about key product updates and view product roadmap ideas.
\- \[Request Demo\](https://front.com/request-demo): Contact the Front sales team for an overview of our product.

\## Company Information
\- \[Careers\](https://front.com/careers): View job openings and learn about working at Front.
\- \[About Us\](https://front.com/about): Discover Front’s mission and company background.

\## Legal and Compliance
\- \[Privacy Policy\](https://front.com/privacy): Understand how Front handles user data and privacy.
\- \[Terms of Service\](https://front.com/terms): Review the terms and conditions for using Front services.
\- \[Cookie Policy\](https://front.com/cookies): Check how cookies are used on the Front website.

evidence.section_path: Services to help you scale > Starter > Professional

evidence.content:
What are your Success Services packages and how much do they cost?

Front offers 3 Success Services packages: Professional Onboarding, Enterprise Onboarding, and Success Services project hours. [You can view pricing and what's included in each package here.](https://front.com/webassets/rebrand/Front_Success_Services_7_3.pdf) To ensure you're set up for success, we require an onboarding package be purchased for contracts over $25k.

How does Front’s free trial work? Do I need a credit card?

Our free 14-day trial offers all the features available in our Professional plan. You can get started without a credit card and can upgrade at any time during your trial. You do not need a credit card to start, continue, or complete your Front trial.

What is a seat?

A seat is a paid Front license that can be granted to a unique user in your organization.

What is a channel?

A channel is the communication medium that people use to get in touch with you like email, SMS, Front Chat, WhatsApp, and more.

Can I connect multiple channel types with the Starter plan?

No, the Starter plan only supports a single channel type of Email, Front Chat, or SMS. The Professional and Enterprise plan support multiple channel types.

What is the maximum number of channels per plan?

Your channel maximum depends on both your plan and number of licenses. On Starter, you can connect up to 10 channels per license, with Professional up to 30 per license, and with Enterprise up to 50 per license. For example, a team of 5 users on Professional would have a maximum of 150 channels. [Please see our help article for more details](https://help.front.com/en/articles/808896).

Which providers power Front AI features?

We’re using OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, and Amazon AWS, which are industry-leading AI providers. Specifically, we use the text generation API.

How is my data processed? Is my data protected?

While we may use your data to further train your model, your data will never be cross-contaminated with other companies’ data. We also have extensive agreements in place with our AI providers to ensure that they’re not training their foundational models on any data that we send to them.

How can I learn more about Front’s security and compliance best practices?

Ensuring your data’s confidentiality, integrity, and availability is core to our mission and platform. [Read more here](https://front.com/security) about Front’s security, privacy and compliance practices. You also may request access to our security documentation by reaching out to your sales representative.

Can I combine seats across multiple plans?

No, plans are assigned at the organization level. You can add or remove seats as needed within a single plan.

Can I pay with my bank instead of my credit card?

You can pay by wire transfer or ACH if you purchase annually and the total contract value is over $12K. Reach out to [billing@front.com](mailto:billing@front.com) to have your payment method updated.

Resources

evidence.page_title: Customer Service Software Integrations and API | Front
evidence.content:
Email, chat, SMS, Slack, and more live in one shared inbox, so nothing gets lost between tools.

See who’s responding, who’s looped in, and what’s next—no channel-based silos or double work.

Customers can switch how they reach you without blowing up history, context, or ownership.

![Integrations page feature 1 integrations multichannel ui 624x624](https://front.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Ffront.com%2Fassets%2Fpages%2Fproduct%2FIntegrations%2FIntegrations-feature-1-integrations-multichannel-ui-624x624.png&w=3840&q=75)

Power AI workflows with real customer data from your CRM, TMS, or other core system.

Those AI workflows route inquiries, provide updates, and clear busywork tied to orders, projects, or quotes.

When AI hits its limit, it passes the customer, context, and prior steps straight to your team.

![Integrations feature 2 integrations playbooks ui 624x624](https://front.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Ffront.com%2Fassets%2Fpages%2Fproduct%2FIntegrations%2FIntegrations-feature-2-integrations-playbooks-ui-624x624.png&w=3840&q=75)

Real-time order status, account info, and records appear in the conversation right when they matter.

Agents see what they need without switching tools or hunting through systems.

Responses are informed by what’s actually true in your backend—not guesses or stale notes.

![Integrations feature 3 integrations salesforce ui 624x624](https://front.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Ffront.com%2Fassets%2Fpages%2Fproduct%2FIntegrations%2FIntegrations-feature-3-integrations-salesforce-ui-624x624.png&w=3840&q=75)

evidence.page_title: Customer Service Software Integrations and API | Front
evidence.content:
Turn a conversation into a tracked issue or project in tools like Jira or Asana without leaving Front.

Status, ownership, and next steps are always synced, so there’s no more, “Let me get back to you.”

Work moves across teams without losing history, context, or who’s on the hook.

![Integrations feature 4 integrations create app object ui 624x624](https://front.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Ffront.com%2Fassets%2Fpages%2Fproduct%2FIntegrations%2FIntegrations-feature-4-integrations-create-app-object-ui-624x624.png&w=3840&q=75)

Update records, log emails, and more to Salesforce, HubSpot, or other CRMs, right in Front.

Changes made in Front or your CRM stay aligned automatically, so no one’s working off stale data.

CRM data flows into Front so rules fire smarter, workflows act faster, and analytics reflect reality.

![Integrations feature 5 integrations CRM autosyncing ui 624x624](https://front.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Ffront.com%2Fassets%2Fpages%2Fproduct%2FIntegrations%2FIntegrations-feature-5-integrations-CRM-autosyncing-ui-624x624.png&w=3840&q=75)

evidence.page_title: Customer Service Software Integrations and API | Front
evidence.content:
Can’t find the answer here? Our [support team](https://help.front.com/en/contact-us) is happy to help.

How does Front connect with our other customer service apps?

Front integrates with 160+ customer service apps and business systems. It pulls real-time data from tools like your CRM, TMS, or project management system, directly into conversations. That way, teams see live context—account details, order status, project updates—inside Front without switching between customer service apps.

Can Front automate work across customer service apps and other systems?

Yes. Front connects customer service apps and backend systems into AI-powered workflows. Using integration data, Front can route conversations based on CRM attributes, trigger updates in tools like Jira or Asana, and automatically log interactions back to Salesforce or HubSpot. This lets work move across customer service apps and Front without manual data entry or context getting lost between tools.

What should I look for when connecting customer service apps to a customer operations platform?

Look for deep, operational integrations—not just surface-level syncing. Front pulls real-time data from customer service apps and other systems into the conversation, uses that data to power AI routing and automation, and keeps changes synced bidirectionally. Updates made in Front reflect back in your connected customer service apps and CRMs, ensuring teams always work with current information and your systems stay aligned end to end.

Which customer service apps and other systems does Front integrate with?

Front integrates with 160+ different tools and channels. See the full list [here](https://front.com/integrations).

Qualified

evidence.content:
Whether you’re looking to build a custom integration just for your team or looking to publicly launch a Front integration, you’re in the right place! Our documentation can help you build everything from contact synchronizing to automated message triaging to custom messaging channels.

Our documentation is designed to get you up and running quickly, with walkthroughs, code examples, Postman collections and more. We’re also available at [Front Community](https://community.front.com/developer-q-a-37) to help with any questions or feedback!

If you are building an app you intend to publish on our App Store, you must build this app in a developer account. If you are building an app for use in a specific customer instance, creating a separate developer account is optional. The developer account will provide you with an environment that does not include production data so it will be safer to test in. The production account, however, will ultimately be where you want your app to live for your company to use it.

You can create a developer account by [signing up here](https://front.com/signup?affiliate=developers). You’ll get access to a free developer environment that will provide everything you need to begin building with our APIs. Developer accounts are limited to 3 teammates, so we recommend sharing credentials using a team email like engineering@ if you have more developers working on your team.

> 📘
>
> You must use a unique email to create a developer account. If you already have a Front customer account, use a (+) alias if your email provider supports it (such as [john.doe+1@gmail.com](mailto:john.doe+1@gmail.com)) or use an email address that is not already associated with Front.

After creating a developer account, read the [Create, manage, and publish apps](https://dev.frontapp.com/docs/create-and-manage-apps) topic to learn how to create apps on the Front Platform.

evidence.content:
Front features APIs that cover a wide variety of functionality. You'll likely only need to use one of them, but some integration use cases are suited for a combination of the offerings. | Name | Description | | --- | --- | | **Core API** | Sync data between Front and external systems and perform backend operations that retrieve, create, modify, or delete resources in Front.
[Learn more](https://dev.frontapp.com/docs/welcome#core-api) | | **MCP Server** | Access Front data and actions through the MCP protocol, allowing AI agents like Claude and ChatGPT to read and reply to conversations and other Front resources.
[Learn more](https://dev.frontapp.com/docs/mcp-server) | | **Connectors** | Interact with third-party APIs and external systems with no-code connectors from Front that allow you to make external API requests or bring in additional context to Front conversations for your users to see.
[Learn more](https://dev.frontapp.com/docs/welcome#connectors) | | **Plugin SDK** | Expose a hosted application in the Front UI. The plugin displays in a drawer alongside Front conversations or in the composer window itself, and can expose additional information and useful actions from external systems for Front users to leverage in their daily workflow.
[Learn more](https://dev.frontapp.com/docs/welcome#plugin-sdk) | | **Channel API** | Add a new inbound/outbound conversation source in Front, such as social media messaging, SMS, custom chat, etc.
[Learn more](https://dev.frontapp.com/docs/welcome#channels-api) | | **Chat Widget** | Add a Front-powered chat box to your website.
[Learn more](https://dev.frontapp.com/docs/welcome#chat-widget) | | **Links** | Add links to items in external systems to Front conversations.
[Learn more](https://dev.frontapp.com/docs/welcome#links) |
evidence.section_path: Welcome to the Front Platform 👋   [Skip link to Welcome to the Front Platform 👋](https://dev.frontapp.com/docs/welcome\#welcome-to-the-front-platform-) > Step 4: Learn about the Front APIs   [Skip link to Step 4: Learn about the Front APIs](https://dev.frontapp.com/docs/welcome\#step-4-learn-about-the-front-apis)

evidence.content:
Our primary backend API that allows you to read, create, update, and delete a wide range of data across Front’s various entities, from Contacts to Comments to Tags. In general, if your use case involves programmatic syncing, export, or modification of Front data, the Core API is likely what you’re looking for. Our webhooks also make it possible to respond to real-time events as actions and updates happen in Front.

A few examples of how the Core API is used today:

- Synchronizing Contacts into Front from a third party CRM
- Automatically drafting replies to incoming messages
- Exporting conversational metadata and analytics to a data warehouse
- Automatically assigning conversations to particular teammates

_**[Core API documentation](https://dev.frontapp.com/docs/core-api-overview)**_

Connectors provide a no-code or low-code means of making API calls to external systems and can also transform URLs or strings found in comments or messages into structured Orders, Shipments, Itineraries, Tasks, etc. that are easy to access right from a conversation in Front. With connectors, you can build rules and macros that retrieve or update information in external systems and also attach a summary of information from an external system directly to conversations in Front.

_**[Connectors documentation](https://dev.frontapp.com/docs/overview-2)**_
evidence.section_path: Welcome to the Front Platform 👋   [Skip link to Welcome to the Front Platform 👋](https://dev.frontapp.com/docs/welcome\#welcome-to-the-front-platform-) > Step 4: Learn about the Front APIs   [Skip link to Step 4: Learn about the Front APIs](https://dev.frontapp.com/docs/welcome\#step-4-learn-about-the-front-apis) > Connectors   [Skip link to Connectors](https://dev.frontapp.com/docs/welcome\#connectors)

evidence.content:
Front Plugins allow you to embed custom side-panel apps directly into the Front UI. These plugins can respond to and interact with the conversation a Front user might be viewing, enabling seamless integrations with CRMs, phone services, task management tools and more.

A few examples of how the Plugin SDK is being used today:

- Integrating a CRM, so that whenever a conversation is opened with a particular person, the corresponding CRM data is automatically displayed to the user
- Integrating a phone service to enable dialing and messaging of customers without need to leave Front to use a separate app
- Integrating a knowledge base to allow agents to search for help articles that might be useful for a customer

_**[Plugin SDK documentation](https://dev.frontapp.com/docs/plugin-overview)**_

A channel is a communication stream (like an email address, Twilio phone number, or Twitter handle) that can be connected to Front. With the Channels API, you can connect any messaging platform to Front. Users will then be able to leverage Front’s powerful collaboration and automation features to view, triage, and respond to those messages. With our APIs, you can build custom channels just for your team, or publish a Partner channel that can be used by any Front customer.

A few examples of how the Channels API is being used today:

- logging phone call records into Front
- synchronizing third party SMS providers into Front
- connecting a custom website live chat with Front

_**[Channels API documentation](https://dev.frontapp.com/docs/channels-overview)**_

evidence.content:
If you’re looking to partner with Front to launch a public integration to all Front customers, please see our guide to [Partnering with Front](https://dev.frontapp.com/docs/partnering-with-front). You can see what some of our other partners have already built at our [Integrations page](https://frontapp.com/integrations).

If you are building an integration meant only for your own company or for one client, you can skip learning about the partnership process.

We offer a developer community that provides the following benefits for anyone building integrations on Front:

- [Developer Q&A](https://community.front.com/developer-q-a-37)—Ask questions about the API, and get answers. This is the primary means to receive technical guidance from our team or the community at large.
- [Give feedback](https://community.front.com/ideas)—Share your ideas with our Product team or vote on existing ones.
- [API news](https://community.front.com/news-updates-40)—Stay informed of API updates, deprecations, and other important news. Make sure to **Subscribe** to this space.
- [Product updates](https://community.front.com/product-updates)—Learn of new Front features.
- [Developer Discussion](https://community.front.com/general-discussion-39)—Connect with other Front developers to share ideas, tips & tricks, or best practices. Also, feel free to let us know how we can improve the developer experience (tools, docs, sample code, etc.) in this space.

You can join at [https://community.front.com](https://community.front.com/)!

_**[Front Chat Widget documentation](https://dev.frontapp.com/docs/chat-overview)**_

Links allow you to add hyperlinks to external systems directly from Front conversations.

_**[Front Links documentation](https://dev.frontapp.com/docs/overview-1)**_
